Title: DONE: MineflayerAdapter/index.js fully implemented with pathfinder
Description:
MineflayerAdapter/index.js now implements:
- WebSocket server (ws library) on WS_PORT so C# can connect
- Mineflayer bot with pathfinder plugin for navigation
- Event forwarding: spawn, health, move, death, blockMined, chat -> C#
- Action dispatcher: move (pathfinder.goto), mine (bot.dig in loop), place, status, chat
- Graceful shutdown on SIGINT/SIGTERM
- package.json updated with mineflayer-pathfinder ^2.4.5 dependency

Pre-game steps: npm install in MineflayerAdapter/ to get the new pathfinder dep.
Completed 2026-06-15.
